user.title: Add Soehnle AC500
user.description: Choose whether you want to select a visible AC500 or enter its Bluetooth MAC address manually.

scan.title: Visible AC500 devices
scan.description: Select one of the AC500 purifiers currently visible via Home Assistant Bluetooth.

manual.title: Enter Bluetooth MAC address
manual.description: Enter the Bluetooth MAC address of the AC500 you want to set up.

confirm_bluetooth.title: Set up {name}
confirm_bluetooth.description: A visible AC500 was discovered at {address}. {details}. Continue to start pairing and add it to Home Assistant.

pair.title: Pair {name}
pair.description: To pair the AC500 at {address}, put the purifier into pairing mode and press its Bluetooth button, then submit this step. {details}. The integration will run the pairing handshake and finish setup.

error.cannot_connect: Could not connect to the AC500.
error.device_not_found: The AC500 is currently not visible via a connectable Bluetooth adapter or proxy.
error.invalid_mac: Enter a valid Bluetooth MAC address in the form AA:BB:CC:DD:EE:FF.
error.no_bluetooth_scanner: Home Assistant currently has no connectable Bluetooth adapter or proxy available.
error.no_devices_found: No visible AC500 devices are currently available.
error.pairing_backend_failed: The Bluetooth backend could not complete pairing.
error.pairing_failed: The AC500 pairing handshake did not complete. Put the purifier into pairing mode, press the Bluetooth button, and try again.
